SPEED / BUNKER CONSUMPTION AT SEA
ABOUT 11.5(L)/12.5(B) KTS ON ABOUT 25.0MT IFO 380CST+0.05 MT MGO
 
ALL SPEED/CONSUMPTIONS BASIS SMOOTH SEAS/CALM WATER, MINIMUM 24 HOURS
CONTINUOUS GOOD WEATHER PERIODS FROM NOON TO NOON,"GOOD WEATHER" MEANS WIND
FORCE UN-EXCEEDING B/F SCALE " 4 ", DOUGLAS SEA STATE " 3 ",AND SIGNIFICANT
WAVE HEIGHT NOT EXCEEDING 1.25M ,WITHOUT ANY ADVERSE CURRENT.
"ABT" MEANS HAVING AN ALLOWANCE OF +/- 0.5 KNOT ON SPEED AND 5 PCT INCREASE
ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION
VESSEL MAIN ENGINE WILL BURNING MGO WHEN NAVIGATE AND IN RIVER/CANALALLOW
WATER/ENTRY PORT/LEAVEING PORT/ MANEUVERING.
 
IDEAL BUNKER CONSUMPTION : ABOUT MT 3.0MT IFO380 +ABOUT 0.05MT MGO FOR
BOILER
CARGO GEAR WORKING BUNKER CONSUMPTION : ABOUT 4.5 MT IFO 380CST +ABOUT
0.05MT MGO FOR BOILER
 
FUEL OIL SPECIFICATION:
THE CHARTERERS SHALL SUPPLY ONLY SUITABLE FUELS AS PER SPECIFICATION TO
ENABLE MAIN PROPULSION AND AUXILIARY MACHINERY AS WELL AS BOILER TO OPERATE
EFFICIENTLY AND WITHOUT HARMFUL EFFECTS.
 
FUELS TO BE MINERAL OIL BASED PRODUCTS OF STABLE AND HOMOGENEOUS NATURE AND
SHALL COMPLY, BE DELIVERED AND SAMPLED IN ACCORDANCE WITH INTERNATIONAL,
REGIONAL OR NATIONAL REGULATIONS; LATEST CIMAC RECOMMENDATIONS; ISO STANDARD
8217:2017 RMG380 & DMB OR ANY SUBSEQUENT AMENDMENTS THEREOF; MARPOL ANNEX
VI; COMPLY TO ASTM D7845 AND SHALL NOT CONTAIN WASTE LUBRICANTS, TAR OIL,
INORGANIC ACIDS, CHEMICALS OR ANY OTHER HARMFUL SUBSTANCES.
NO MIXING BUNKERS TO BE ALLOWED
